## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, new hires, and ongoing experiments for Monograph's marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Monograph hired 3 new team members: 2 demand gen, 1 content marketer](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [GrowthX published 5 articles, will continue publishing until new hires onboard](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [New content clusters added to Airtable for consideration](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Reddit content strategy in development, with focus on original data and appropriate tone](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Experiment planned to test efficacy of TLDRs vs FAQs in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)

## Topics

### New Hires and Onboarding

  - [3 new team members starting in 2 weeks: 2 demand gen, 1 content marketer](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [GrowthX will assist with onboarding and context-sharing](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Robert to assign one demand gen hire to lead relationship with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)

### Content Production and Strategy

  - [5 articles published by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [New content clusters added to Airtable under "Considering" tab](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Healthy "Approve to Start" queue (2-3 weeks of content)](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Focus on Considering tab for new strategy alignment](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)

### Reddit Content Strategy

  - [Pipeline in development for Reddit posts](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Emphasis on original data and authoritative information](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Tone being fine-tuned to balance between personable and professional](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [Topics based on popular posts, pain points, and traction keywords](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)

### Blog Post Experiment

  - [Proposed test: 15 articles split into 3 groups (no FAQ, TLDR at top, standard with FAQ)](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [Goal: Measure impact on citations and time on page](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [Robert cautioned about statistical significance with small sample size](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Focus on time on page as key metric for reader engagement](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)

### Competitive Intelligence

  - [Chris exploring AI-driven approach using product documentation and release notes](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Matthew suggested using Exa for historical data retrieval and Cloud Code for analysis](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)

### Team Structure and Roles

  - [Content team now led by Chris, who made first hire](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [Demand gen team to oversee SEO as distribution channel](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Discussion on balancing content creation and channel management](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to post published articles in Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Matthew to share Reddit content samples later this week](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [Robert to send new hire profiles for Matthew's input on liaison selection](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
  - [GrowthX to start Reddit publishing next week, pending pipeline completion](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [Matthew to provide more detailed thoughts on content strategy approach](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Continue refining and executing content strategy across various channels](https://fathom.video/share/YRwsg3D-AzhAUYN3vMZ5MC25XJthE5Yg?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
